review_question: Is the health algorithm recorded with owner, purpose, data, setting, and decision role?
Has performance been validated for the intended population, setting, workflow, and use?
Are subgroup performance, missingness, access barriers, and proxy labels reviewed?
Are data minimization, access controls, security, and secondary-use limits documented?
Are clinician review, override authority, escalation, and accountability defined?
Are outcomes, errors, alert fatigue, drift, overrides, and harms monitored?
Can the system be paused, limited, rolled back, or retired when unsafe?
